channel.title: SlashAI — AI Tools for Solopreneurs
channel.description: Honest reviews, practical guides, and real workflows for one-person businesses.

item.title: Alfred_ AI Chief of Staff Review 2026: Your Autonomous Executive Assistant
item.description: Hands-on review of Alfred_, the AI Chief of Staff that automates email, calendar, and task management for solopreneurs and executives.

item.title: MWM AI Review 2026: Turn App Ideas into iOS Businesses in Minutes
item.description: Hands-on review of MWM AI, the platform that transforms simple prompts into native iOS app businesses with built-in monetization and distribution.

item.title: 21 Best Free AI Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Tested & Ranked)
item.description: You don't need to spend a dime to start using AI. These 21 free tools cover writing, design, coding, meetings, automation, and more — all tested on real freelance work.

item.title: What's New in AI for Solopreneurs: March 2026
item.description: Perplexity's local AI agent, OpenAI's focus shift, Nvidia's security layer for AI agents, and Google's new free automation tool — everything that matters for one-person businesses this month.

item.title: Cursor vs GitHub Copilot: Which AI Coding Tool Is Better for Solopreneurs in 2026?
item.description: We tested both tools for three months building real products. Here's which one wins for solo developers, freelancers who code, and non-technical founders.

item.title: 7 Best AI Agents for Solopreneurs in 2026 (Tested)
item.description: AI agents that actually run parts of your business autonomously. We tested the top agents for email, research, customer support, and workflow automation.

item.title: Lindy AI Review 2026: The AI Agent That Runs Your Business?
item.description: We tested Lindy AI for 30 days handling email, scheduling, and CRM updates. Here's whether it actually saves time for solopreneurs.

item.title: The Complete Guide to AI Tools for Solopreneurs in 2026
item.description: Everything a one-person business needs to know about AI tools — what to use, what to skip, and how to build a stack that saves 20+ hours per week.

item.title: How to Start a One-Person Business with AI in 2026: The Complete Guide
item.description: A step-by-step guide to launching and running a solo business powered by AI. From idea to first dollar — using tools that cost less than a coffee subscription.

item.title: Create Professional AI Videos with HeyGen — No Camera Required
item.description: Learn how to use HeyGen to create talking-head videos with AI avatars, translate content into 175+ languages, and scale your video marketing without a studio.

item.title: Automate Your Email with Lindy AI in 15 Minutes
item.description: Set up Lindy AI to triage your inbox, draft replies, and schedule meetings automatically. A practical step-by-step tutorial.

item.title: Build Your First AI Workflow with n8n (No Code)
item.description: n8n is the open-source Zapier alternative with native AI support. Here's how to build an automated lead processing workflow from scratch.

item.title: How to Set Up OpenClaw: Complete Beginner's Guide
item.description: OpenClaw went viral in 2026. Here's how to install it, connect your tools, and run your first AI agent — no coding required.

item.title: Jasper AI Review 2026: Is It Worth $49/mo for Freelancers?
item.description: Three months of testing Jasper AI on real client work. Here's our honest verdict on whether it's worth the premium price.

item.title: Notion AI Review 2026: Best All-in-One Workspace for Solopreneurs?
item.description: Six months of daily Notion use. Here's whether the AI add-on is worth $10/mo and if Notion can really replace your entire tool stack.

item.title: 7 Best AI Productivity Tools for One-Person Businesses in 2026
item.description: These AI tools actually remove work from your plate — not just add another app to your stack. Tested for solopreneurs.

item.title: 15 Best AI Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Tested & Ranked)
item.description: We tested the top AI tools across writing, productivity, design, and marketing. Here are the 15 that actually save freelancers time and money.

item.title: 10 Best AI Writing Tools for Solopreneurs in 2026 (Honest Review)
item.description: We tested every major AI writing tool on real freelance work. Here's which ones actually save time and which ones waste it.

item.title: Jasper vs Copy.ai: Which Is Better for Solo Marketers in 2026?
item.description: We tested both tools head-to-head on identical projects. Here's which one wins for long-form content, short-form copy, and value for money.

item.title: How to Automate Client Onboarding with AI (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Set up an AI-powered client onboarding workflow that saves 30+ minutes per new client. Tools needed: Zapier, Notion, and your email.
